generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor converting electrical input (current I_M) into mechanical torque (τ_M) for the robot axis."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission (gearwheel) receiving torque τ_M from the motor and transmitting torque τ_G to the cycloidal gearbox."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox receiving torque τ_G and outputting torque τ_out to achieve the desired motion of the robot axis."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft providing high-resolution angular position measurements for backlash reduction."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox enabling comparison with motor encoder to infer elasticity and friction in the drivetrain."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing real-time access to target/actual position, speed, acceleration, and motor current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance ControllerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIK840DController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) describing component-connector architecture of the first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) and their interconnections."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysMLBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML behavioral models representing structural and behavioral relationships between components (e.g., Block Definition Diagrams, Internal Block Diagrams)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model simulating frictionless dynamics of motor, gearbox, and torque transmission."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance SimulinkFrictionInclusiveDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model simulating friction-inclusive dynamics using Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model parameterized for the gearbox to derive static and kinetic friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model capturing velocity-dependent friction effects in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model representing hysteresis and pre-sliding displacement effects in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model capturing dynamic friction behavior with bristle deflection and viscous effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance MotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model simulating motor dynamics to derive torque τ_M, angular velocity ω_M, and acceleration from input current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance GearboxDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model simulating gearbox dynamics to derive torque τ_G, angular velocity ω_G, and acceleration from motor output."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series measurement of motor input current I_M from the SINUMERIK 840D controller."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque τ_M computed from input current I_M using motor constants (Kt)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor angular velocity ω_M computed from encoder data and motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance GearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearbox torque τ_G computed from motor torque τ_M and gear ratio."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearbox angular velocity ω_G computed from motor angular velocity ω_M and gear ratio."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance OutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output torque τ_out from Simulink friction-inclusive dynamics model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkFrictionInclusiveDynamicsModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angle from the secondary encoder for comparison with simulated behavior."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance FrictionParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) from comparison between simulated and measured data traces."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputTorqueData, OutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlAlgorithmOptimizationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML (Systems Modeling Language) for structural and behavioral modeling of the robot axis components."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, StructuralVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkProcessingFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for creating executable simulation models of motor, gearbox, and friction dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, DynamicsSimulationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) framework for standardizing the digital shadow's data structure and interoperability."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService, UnifiedDashboardService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, angle) from the robot to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance ProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component encapsulating data calculation and simulation models to compute derived data traces (e.g., torque from current)."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, DynamicsSimulationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction modeling and identification combining white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models to derive friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight, AccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance DynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing executable simulations of frictionless and friction-inclusive dynamics for comparative analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemBehaviorInsight
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating measured and simulated data into a unified structure for interoperability."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataConsistencyInsight
]

instance UnifiedDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling real-time visualization of deviations between simulated and actual system behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance ControlAlgorithmOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service using derived friction models to enhance robot motion control algorithms and reduce inaccuracies."
    DTDFVocab:provides AccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance StructuralVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing SysML-based visualization of the component-connector architecture and energy flows."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters in the gearbox by comparing simulated and measured data traces."
]

instance AccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control algorithms to compensate for friction-induced inaccuracies (up to 30%) and optimize machining processes."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SystemBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of deviations between simulated and actual system behavior for proactive maintenance."
]

instance DataConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensured consistency between measured and simulated data traces through standardized AAS framework."
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enables real-time monitoring of system performance and identification of anomalies in robot motion."
]

instance StructuralInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed visualization of the component-connector architecture and energy flows in the robot axis."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin connects to the physical system via:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Used for **real-time streaming** of sensor data (e.g., motor current *I_M*, output angle) from the robot’s CNC controller (Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl) to the digital shadow.
  - **Data Trace Linking**: Each data point is traceable to its **source** (e.g., sensor channel, processing component) and **model** (e.g., Simulink friction model), ensuring semantic consistency and enabling cross-referencing between physical measurements and virtual simulations."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards and frameworks:
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Implemented to standardize the digital shadow’s data structure, interoperability, and integration with industrial systems.
  - **SysML (Systems Modeling Language)**: Used for modeling the robot’s structural and behavioral architecture, ensuring compliance with model-based systems engineering (MBSE) practices.
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Leveraged for real-time data streaming, aligning with Industry 4.0 communication standards for cyber-physical systems."
]
